title: Phone and communication
explanation:
Phone and communication

  • verbs: text, call back, hang up, leave a message, reply
  • nouns: voicemail, signal, contact, notification
  • phrases: get through, speak up, hold on

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I couldn't ____ — the line was busy. | *get through | hang up | text
Please ____ — I can't hear you. | *speak up | call back | reply
She didn't answer, so I left a ____. | *voicemail | signal | notification
I'll ____ you later this evening. | *call back | hang up | hold

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: Please ____ a minute — I'll find the file. | hold on
There's no ____ in the tunnel. | signal
Did you ____ to her email? | reply
I got a ____ on my phone about the delivery. | notification

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Don't ____ — wait for the answer. | *hang up | get through | speak up
Save my number in your ____. | *contacts | voicemails | signals
He sent me a voice ____. | *message | notification | reply
Sorry, wrong number — I'll ____. | *hang up | hold on | call back
